name: Castle of Chaos
author: Poki
description: Castle of Chaos is an action shooter game in which you and a friend will have to shoot and survive your way through over 60 waves of enemies. The castle is being invaded by monsters and ghosts! It's up to you to grab your guns and start blasting them all away. You'll have to be careful though, ghosts can only be shot by plasma guns and monsters can only be shot with bullets. You'll have to switch out your guns accordingly. Keep an eye on your ammo as well! If you run out of bullets you'll be at risk of being overrun. Each fighter also has their own ultimate moves like a rocket barrage or a giant laser beam. Try each character to see which one fits you best! Can you make it through all 60 waves of Castle of Chaos? How to play Castle of Chaos? Move with the Up and Down arrow keys! Use the Spacebar to shoot! Switch weapons with X! Who created Castle of Chaos? Castle of Chaos was created by Brad Erkilla. Play their other games on Poki: Space Thing , Squish Run and Castle Pals ! How can I play Castle of Chaos for free? You can play Castle of Chaos for free on Poki. Can I play Castle of Chaos on mobile devices and desktop? Castle of Chaos can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Castle of Chaos with my friend? Yes! Castle of Chaos is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
